_comment: PUBLIC-SCREEN CHANNELS (docs/cinema.md Phase 5). A screen tunes the most specific matching row: faction beats state beats the open feed. categories = what it may pull off the media manifest. A new channel = a ROW (ProtoPublicScreen.ensure_channels folds additively; the open_air floor lives in code).

channels._note: the occupier's propaganda loop — clips only, wherever the Faith Bloc holds
